entries.source: Geography Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: Geography Explorer AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, සහ geography life හැඩගස්වන ආකාරය ගවේෂණය කරන්න.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.

You may be required to enter your billing information in order to sign up for Free Trial. If you do enter your billing information when signing up for Free Trial, you will not be charged by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) until Free Trial has expired. On the last day of Free Trial period, unless you cancelled your Subscription, you will be automatically charged the applicable Subscription fees for the type of Subscription you have selected. At any time and without notice, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to (i) modify Terms of Service of Free Trial offer, or (ii) cancel such Free Trial offer.

entries.source: Habit Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Habit Coach AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: intentions triggers, rewards, සහ recovery plans සහිත කුඩා repeatable learning habits බවට පත් කරන්න.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: card එකක් දිගටම fail වන්නේ නම්, එය repeat කිරීම පමණක් නොකරන්න. එය අමාරු ඇයි අහන්න. misconception uncover කිරීමට Socratic Instruction, procedural gaps සඳහා Math Step Coach, හෝ better study prompt එකක් සොයාගැනීමට AI learning prompt library භාවිතා කරන්න.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: answer එක yes නම්, AI ඔබට study කිරීමට උදව් කළා. answer එක no නම්, next move එක තවත් reading නොවේ. එය active practice ය. Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, හෝ AI learning prompt library open කර topic එක ඔබ උත්සාහ කළ යුතු task එකක් බවට පත් කරන්න.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: learner ගේ intent vague නම්, reasons, best modes, controversy level, සහ evidence quality සමඟ people 3 සිට 5 දක්වා suggest කරන්න. person නම් කර ඇති නමුත් time slice අඩු නම්, in-character dialogue ට පෙර එම person ගේ meaningful versions offer කරන්න. person සහ time slice clear වූ පසු, person speak කිරීමට පෙර room සහ dossier build කරන්න.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: learner's intent vague නම්, එය concrete arrival options 3කට resolve කර choice එකකට stop කරන්න. passport දැනටමත් clear නම්, paragraph එකකට වෙනුවට modular cards සමඟ world open කරන්න.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: response එක too broad ලෙස දැනේ නම්, narrow කරන්න. one example, one misconception, one check question, හෝ one next step ඉල්ලන්න. too easy නම් challenge එකක් ඉල්ලන්න. too hard නම් ඔබ දැනටමත් දන්නා දේ සිට bridge එකක් ඉල්ලන්න.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: work එක homework නම්, Homework Coach තුළ ආරම්භ කරන්න. math නම්, Math Step Coach භාවිතා කර එකවර එක step පරීක්ෂා කිරීමට ඉල්ලන්න. concept එකක් deeply understand කිරීමට උත්සාහ කරන්නේ නම්, Socratic Instruction භාවිතා කර summary ඉල්ලීමට පෙර questions වලට answer කරන්න.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: ඔබ California resident කෙනෙකු නම්, අපි ඔබ ගැන collect කරන data දැනගැනීමටත්, ඔබේ data delete කිරීමටත්, එය sell (share) නොකරන්නැයි ඉල්ලීමටත් ඔබට අයිතියක් ඇත. ඔබේ data protection rights exercise කිරීමට, ඔබට certain requests ඉදිරිපත් කර අපෙන් අහන්න පුළුවන්:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: ඔබ European Union (EU) සහ European Economic Area (EEA) resident කෙනෙකු නම්, GDPR යටතේ ආවරණය වන certain data protection rights ඔබට ඇත. ඔබේ Personal Data correct, amend, delete, හෝ use limit කිරීමට reasonable steps ගැනීමට අපි අරමුණු කරමු. ඔබ ගැන අප සතු Personal Data කුමක්ද දැනගැනීමට හෝ එය අපගේ systems වලින් remove කිරීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්, support@inspir.app වෙත email කරන්න. ඔබ European Union (EU) සහ European Economic Area (EEA) resident කෙනෙකු නම්, GDPR යටතේ ආවරණය වන certain data protection rights ඔබට ඇත. ඔබේ Personal Data correct, amend, delete, හෝ use limit කිරීමට reasonable steps ගැනීමට අපි අරමුණු කරමු. certain circumstances වලදී, පහත data protection rights ඔබට ඇත:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: මෙම Privacy Policy ගැන ඔබට කිසිදු ප්‍රශ්නයක් ඇත්නම්, email මඟින් අප අමතන්න: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: ඔබ homework question එකක් paste කර final answer copy කළහොත්, task එක finish කළ හැකි නමුත් skill එක build කර නැත. ඔබ hint එකක් ඉල්ලා, ඔබේ thinking explain කර, answer compare කර, similar problem එකක් try කළහොත්, AI shortcut එකක් වෙනුවට study partner එකක් බවට පත්වේ.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: Service හරහා ලබා ගත හැකි ඕනෑම product හෝ service එකක් (“Purchase”) purchase කිරීමට ඔබට අවශ්‍ය නම්, ඔබේ credit හෝ debit card number, card expiration date, billing address, සහ shipping information ඇතුළුව නමුත් ඒවාට සීමා නොවී Purchase සම්බන්ධ certain information සැපයීමට ඔබෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටිය හැක. ඔබ නියෝජනය කර warrant කරන්නේ: (i) ඕනෑම Purchase එකක් සම්බන්ධව card(s) හෝ වෙනත් payment method(s) භාවිතා කිරීමට ඔබට legal right ඇති බව; සහ (ii) අපට ඔබ සපයන information true, correct, සහ complete බව. payment පහසු කිරීමට සහ Purchases complete කිරීමට අපි third-party services භාවිතා කළ හැක. ඔබේ information submit කිරීමෙන්, අපගේ Privacy Policy යටතේ එම third parties වෙත information ලබා දීමට ඔබ අපට right ලබා දෙයි. product හෝ service availability, product හෝ service description හෝ price හි errors, ඔබේ order හි error, හෝ වෙනත් හේතු ඇතුළුව නමුත් ඒවාට සීමා නොවී ඕනෑම අවස්ථාවක ඔබේ order refuse හෝ cancel කිරීමට අපි right reserve කරමු. fraud හෝ unauthorized හෝ illegal transaction එකක් සැක වූ විට ඔබේ order refuse හෝ cancel කිරීමට අපි right reserve කරමු; තීරණය අපගේ වන අතර contest කළ නොහැක.

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: AI වේගයෙන් ඉදිරියට යන ලෝකයක, දිගටම පවතින්නේ human consciousness සහ creativity පමණි. Albert Einstein වරක් කිව්වා, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."

entries.source: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation. For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: අදාළ වන ඕනෑම national හෝ international law හෝ regulation එකක් උල්ලංඝනය වන කිසිදු ආකාරයකින්. minors අනවශ්‍ය content වෙත නිරාවරණය කිරීමෙන් හෝ වෙනත් ආකාරයකින් exploit, harm, හෝ exploit/harm කිරීමට උත්සාහ කිරීම සඳහා. “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” හෝ ඒ හා සමාන solicitation ඇතුළුව advertising හෝ promotional material transmit කිරීම හෝ යැවීමට procure කිරීම සඳහා. Company, Company employee, වෙනත් user කෙනෙකු, හෝ වෙනත් පුද්ගලයෙකු හෝ entity එකක් impersonate කිරීම හෝ impersonate කිරීමට උත්සාහ කිරීම සඳහා. අන් අයගේ rights උල්ලංඝනය කරන, හෝ illegal, threatening, fraudulent, හෝ harmful වන, හෝ unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, හෝ harmful purpose හෝ activity එකකට සම්බන්ධ වන කිසිදු ආකාරයකින්. Service භාවිතා කිරීම හෝ භුක්ති විඳීම restrict හෝ inhibit කරන, හෝ අපගේ තීරණය අනුව Company හෝ Service users ට harm හෝ offend කළ හැකි හෝ liability වෙත expose කළ හැකි වෙනත් conduct කිසිවකට engage වීම සඳහා.

entries.value: මෙම guide තුළ

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: ප්‍රශ්නය, ඔබ දැනටමත් උත්සාහ කළ දේ, ඔබ හිරවූ තැන, සහ ඔබට hint එකක්, step check එකක්, හෝ feedback අවශ්‍යද යන්න ඇතුළත් කරන්න.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: ඔබ දන්නා දේ, ඔබ උත්සාහ කළ දේ, ඔබට අවශ්‍ය level එක, සහ ඔබට අවශ්‍ය help වර්ගය ඇතුළත් කරන්න.
